sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90053" key="prosskhne/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσσκηνέω</orth>, <sense id="n90053.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be adjacent</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐν Αἰθιοπία καὶ τοῖς -οῦσιν αὐτὴν τόποις</foreign> prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσκυνοῦσιν</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nech.</author> </bibl> in <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cat.Cod Astr.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0995.tlg001:7:140" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.140</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
